criteria.name: Hourly CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi present in committed hourly CSV headers

criteria.name: Daily CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi present in committed daily CSV headers

criteria.name: Imputation report exists
criteria.evidence: data/processed/imputation_report.csv exists in HEAD with station,variable,time_start,time_end,method,count_affected columns

criteria.name: Imputation runs after concat+dedup
criteria.evidence: Pipeline code in cleaning.py calls impute after concat+dedup steps

criteria.name: Long gaps remain NaN
criteria.evidence: Imputation uses interpolate(method='linear', limit=6) — long gaps preserved as NaN per test assertions

criteria.name: FWI calculated on imputed data
criteria.evidence: Pipeline order: concat → dedup → impute → FWI → resample_daily → write

summary: Phase 3 pipeline integration review: PASS. All 9 acceptance criteria satisfied. Previous REJECT was due to stale pre-flight checks using spec pseudocode names; Ralph fixed them in commit 2756cb8. Artifact validation PASS, pre-flight PASS, architecture compliant (all adapters inherit BaseAdapter, router uses registry). All Phase 3 integration tests pass. New commits since last review were lint fixes (d3eea22, bc5b301) and the pre-flight name fix (2756cb8).
